Introduction
    The journey of a girl who disguises herself as her brother to attend a military school, set in the backdrop of 1910s China and the geopolitical turmoil the country experiences. The protagonist finds friendship, love and courage.

Also known as: Học viện quân sự Liệt Hỏa
